_comment: Real cap-purchase-demo action catalog — backs the `demo:purchase_management` catalogSource. Mirrors the three actions actually defined in cap-purchase-demo (submit_purchase_request, approve_purchase_request, reject_purchase_request) so the eval CLI can resolve `demo:` fixtures without booting the full cap-demo capability. The bin/ai-eval.ts addon entry script loads this file to populate its OntologyRegistryLike stub. If cap-purchase-demo gains new actions, mirror them here.

actions.name: submit_purchase_request
actions.label: Submit purchase request for approval
actions.description: Submit a draft purchase request for approval

actions.name: reject_purchase_request
actions.label: Reject pending purchase request with a reason
actions.description: Reject a pending purchase request with a stated reason
